## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR focused on one change or closely related set of changes.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior, setup, MCP tool schemas, or agent instructions changed.
- [ ] I added or updated focused tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I checked that no secrets, credentials, production access details, or private deployment notes are included.

## Risk Review

- [ ] MCP tool schemas remain backward compatible, or the breaking change is explicitly documented.
- [ ] Owner privacy rules still hold: excluded topics are not indexed, negotiated, logged, or shown to other agents.
- [ ] Mutual match rules still hold: no chat opens before both owners confirm.
- [ ] Database changes include Prisma migrations when schema changes are required.

## Screenshots

For UI changes, add before/after screenshots or note why screenshots are not applicable.
